an2.32:1.1: "Bhikkhus, I will teach you the plane of the bad person and the plane of the good person. Listen and attend closely. I will speak."
an2.32:1.2: "Yes, Bhante," those bhikkhus replied. The Blessed One said this:
an2.32:1.3: "And what is the plane of the bad person? A bad person is ungrateful and unthankful. For ingratitude and unthankfulness are extolled by the bad. Ingratitude and unthankfulness belong entirely to the plane of the bad person.
an2.32:1.4: "And what is the plane of the good person? A good person is grateful and thankful. For gratitude and thankfulness are extolled by the good. Gratitude and thankfulness belong entirely to the plane of the good person."
